rules.message: Every entry under '## Suspected Causes' MUST cite at least one concrete piece of evidence (commit SHA, CI run id, PR number, or release tag).
Every entry under '## Next Actions' MUST include an 'OWNER:' field. 'OWNER: TBD' is acceptable; omitting the field is not.
If a GitHub MCP call returned no matching events, the report MUST say so explicitly in the relevant section. The generator MUST NOT fabricate commits, runs, or releases.
The '## Summary' section MUST be 2-3 sentences.
The whole report MUST stay under 400 words.
